title: Textured Storybook
description: Ce style imite l'illustration contemporaine de livres pour enfants d'inspiration mid-century en utilisant des techniques numériques qui reproduisent la gouache traditionnelle, le pastel gras et le crayon de couleur. Il présente des compositions planes et superposées sans éclairage directionnel, s'appuyant plutôt sur des palettes chaudes et terreuses et des bords très tactiles brossés à sec. Les formes sont définies par des blocs de couleur plutôt que par des contours stricts, détaillées avec des textures de crayon ludiques et grattées pour évoquer une atmosphère chaleureuse et artisanale.
prompt: Render a contemporary children's book illustration using digital techniques that perfectly mimic traditional gouache, wax pastel, and colored pencil. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The image must occupy the absolute entire dedicated space, full bleed to all four corners with no borders, no frames, and no white margins. The visual approach relies on flat, diffuse lighting with absolutely no directional shadows or chiaroscuro, building depth purely through overlapping flat shapes parallel to the picture plane. Forms are constructed from solid blocks of opaque color dominated by {{primary_color}}, complemented by {{secondary_color}} midtones, and punctuated by playful {{accent_color}} details. Do not use strict outlines or crisp vector contours; instead, define silhouettes using ragged, dry-brushed edges and chalky transitions. Layer the surfaces with highly tactile, scratchy colored pencil textures, crayon scribbles, and heavy watercolor paper grain. Internal details should be rendered with loose, naive, hand-drawn line work that feels organic and slightly imperfect. The overall atmosphere must be cozy, nostalgic, and handcrafted, evoking a mid-century folk-art aesthetic with charmingly clumsy proportions and a warm, earthy resonance. Ensure the granular texture of dry media is visible across all color fields, unifying the composition with a distinctly handmade, tactile quality. gouache illustration, colored pencil texture, dry brush, naive art, flat composition, heavy paper grain, children's book style, folk art inspired, highly tactile, whimsical, warm palette, hand-drawn feel, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
background_prompt: A flat, 2D textured background environment inspired by contemporary children's book illustrations, mimicking traditional gouache and wax pastel on heavy paper. The scene features overlapping, flat planes of opaque {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}}, detailed with scratchy {{accent_color}} colored pencil scribbles and dry-brushed edges. The atmosphere is warm, cozy, and naive, with no directional shadows, relying entirely on chalky textures, visible paper grain, and organic, handcrafted imperfections to create a tactile, inviting backdrop.
description_en: This style emulates contemporary, mid-century-inspired children's book illustration using digital techniques that mimic traditional gouache, wax pastel, and colored pencil. It features flat, overlapping compositions with no directional lighting, relying instead on warm, earthy palettes and highly tactile, dry-brushed edges. Forms are defined by blocks of color rather than strict outlines, detailed with playful, scratchy pencil textures to evoke a cozy, handcrafted atmosphere.
description_fr: Ce style imite l'illustration contemporaine de livres pour enfants d'inspiration mid-century en utilisant des techniques numériques qui reproduisent la gouache traditionnelle, le pastel gras et le crayon de couleur. Il présente des compositions planes et superposées sans éclairage directionnel, s'appuyant plutôt sur des palettes chaudes et terreuses et des bords très tactiles brossés à sec. Les formes sont définies par des blocs de couleur plutôt que par des contours stricts, détaillées avec des textures de crayon ludiques et grattées pour évoquer une atmosphère chaleureuse et artisanale.
prompt_removebg: Render a contemporary children's book illustration using digital techniques that perfectly mimic traditional gouache, wax pastel, and colored pencil. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The entire composition is composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. The visual approach relies on flat, diffuse lighting with absolutely no directional shadows or chiaroscuro, building depth purely through overlapping flat shapes parallel to the picture plane. Forms are constructed from solid blocks of opaque color dominated by {{primary_color}}, complemented by {{secondary_color}} midtones, and punctuated by playful {{accent_color}} details. Do not use strict outlines or crisp vector contours; instead, define silhouettes using ragged, dry-brushed edges and chalky transitions that interact naturally with the {{background_color}} backdrop, explicitly allowing intentional overflow where parts of the scene can extend beyond the visible frame. Layer the surfaces with highly tactile, scratchy colored pencil textures, crayon scribbles, and heavy watercolor paper grain. Internal details should be rendered with loose, naive, hand-drawn line work that feels organic and slightly imperfect. The overall atmosphere must be cozy, nostalgic, and handcrafted, evoking a mid-century folk-art aesthetic with charmingly clumsy proportions and a warm, earthy resonance. Ensure the granular texture of dry media is visible across all color fields, unifying the composition with a distinctly handmade, tactile quality. gouache illustration, colored pencil texture, dry brush, naive art, flat composition, heavy paper grain, children's book style, folk art inspired, highly tactile, whimsical, warm palette, hand-drawn feel
background_prompt_removebg: A flat, 2D textured background environment inspired by contemporary children's book illustrations, mimicking traditional gouache and wax pastel on heavy paper. The scene features overlapping, flat planes of opaque {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}}, detailed with scratchy {{accent_color}} colored pencil scribbles and dry-brushed edges. The atmosphere is warm, cozy, and naive, with no directional shadows, relying entirely on chalky textures, visible paper grain, and organic, handcrafted imperfections to create a tactile, inviting backdrop. In the foreground, a decorative border of dry-brushed shapes and crayon patterns frames the invisible subject, transitioning softly and organically into a flat {{background_color}} surface with ragged, textured edges.
